name: playwright-api-bdd-framework
description: Playwright API Testing Framework with BDD

scripts.test:ui:register:fast: cross-env ENV=dev playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep=@register --workers=75%
scripts.test:ui:fast: cross-env ENV=dev playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep=@ui --workers=75%
scripts.test:ui:smoke:fast: cross-env ENV=dev playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "@ui.*@smoke|@smoke.*@ui" --workers=75%
scripts.test:ui:smoke:ci: cross-env ENV=dev playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "@ui.*@smoke|@smoke.*@ui" --workers=3
scripts.perf:smoke: npm run perf:prepare && npm run perf:archive:smoke && cross-env ENV=dev artillery run perf/scenarios/api.smoke.yml -o out/perf/api-smoke.json
scripts.perf:load: npm run perf:prepare && npm run perf:archive:load && cross-env ENV=dev artillery run perf/scenarios/api.load.yml -o out/perf/api-load.json
scripts.perf:ui: npm run perf:prepare && npm run perf:archive:ui && cross-env ENV=dev artillery run perf/scenarios/ui.critical.yml -o out/perf/ui-critical.json
scripts.perf:report:smoke: npm run perf:prepare && node perf/reporters/generate-report.js --input out/perf/api-smoke.json --output out/perf/api-smoke.html --title "API Smoke Performance Report"
scripts.perf:report:load: npm run perf:prepare && node perf/reporters/generate-report.js --input out/perf/api-load.json --output out/perf/api-load.html --title "API Load Performance Report"
scripts.perf:report:ui: npm run perf:prepare && node perf/reporters/generate-report.js --input out/perf/ui-critical.json --output out/perf/ui-critical.html --title "UI Critical Performance Report"
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rimraf node_modules package-lock.json
